mapper.select: SELECT course_id, course_name, duration, description FROM course
SELECT course_id, course_name, duration, description FROM course ORDER BY course_name ASC OFFSET #{offset} LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO course(course_id, course_name, duration, description) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{duration}, #{description})
mapper.select: SELECT course_id, course_name, duration, description FROM course WHERE LOWER(course_name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(description) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
